submission.workflow_yaml:
name: concurrency-09-multi-job-hold
on: workflow_dispatch
concurrency: multi-job-workflow-group
jobs:
  one:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    steps:
      - name: one
        run: |
          echo "SCENARIO=09-multi-job job=one"
          sleep 3
          echo "DONE=one"
  two:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    steps:
      - name: two
        run: |
          echo "SCENARIO=09-multi-job job=two"
          sleep 3
          echo "DONE=two"
